meaning: n.监督人,管理人,检查员,督学,主管人,[计](网络)超级用户
examples: The supervisor is always very critical.
I have a meeting with my supervisor about my research topic.
We wanted to be here early in case the whatsit, maintenance supervisor had forgotten to deal with it.
When the plane was making its stop in Denver, a supervisor met the flight.
Some want the trust funds to be placed in receivership, under a neutral supervisor.
